messages.content: write keywords for facebook marketplace in the same way as this: "عطر فلور ماسك (itr: Parfum Fleur musc)"

- Buy and sell
- Fragrances
- Perfume
- Fleur Musc
- Parfum
- Itr (Attar)
- Beauty products
- Cosmetics
- Authentic products
- Great deals
- Brand new

what is "مورد معتمد" in english?
"مورد معتمد" translates to "Authorized supplier" in English.
write an appealing answer for a client asking for a perfume price, the price is 400 L.E

Thank you for your interest in our perfume collection! The price for the perfume you've inquired about is 400 L.E. We offer competitive pricing along with top-quality fragrances to meet your needs. Feel free to explore our wide range of scents and we're confident you'll find something perfect for you.  Don't hesitate to reach out if you have any further questions or if there's anything else we can assist you with. Happy shopping!

write keywords suitable for facebook marketplace for "fleur musc narciso rodriguez for her" perfume, write each keyword in the same order as this: “عطر فلور ماسك (itr: Parfum Fleur musc)” where you write the keyword in arabic and the itr next to it in french

- فيسبوك ماركتبليس (Facebook Marketplace)
- شراء وبيع (Buy and sell)
- عطور (Fragrances)
- عطر (Perfume)
- فلور ماسك (Fleur Musc)
- نارسيسو رودريغيز (Narciso Rodriguez)
- لها (For Her)
- عطر فرنسي (French Perfume)
- منتجات تجميل (Beauty Products)
- تخفيضات رائعة (Great Deals)
- عطور أصلية (Authentic Perfumes)
- جديدة بالكامل (Brand New)
make them more related to perfume and the brand. and make them 20

- نفحات مثيرة (Sensual Notes)
- متعة العطور (Perfume Pleasure)
- عطر طويل الأمد (Long-lasting Perfume)
- إطلالة متألقة (A Dazzling Presence)
- منتج عالي الجودة (High-Quality Product)
- عبير مغري (Alluring Scent)

- تجربة رائحة استثنائية (Exceptional Fragrance Experience)

write a title in french for the product
"Parfum Fleur Musc Narciso Rodriguez pour Elle"
write an appealing title for "maison francis kurkdjian baccarat rouge 540" perfume product in french
"L'envoûtant parfum Maison Francis Kurkdjian Baccarat Rouge 540"
write keywords for this product in the same shape as before only this time write itr inside the parenthesis with the corresponding french word

- Parfum (itr: fragrance) 
- Maison Francis Kurkdjian 
- Baccarat Rouge 540 
- Parfum français (French perfume) 
- Parfum de luxe (Luxury perfume) 
- Note boisée (Woody note) 
- Note florale (Floral note) 
- Note ambrée (Amber note) 
- Fragrance unisexe (Unisex fragrance) 
- Parfum sophistiqué (Sophisticated perfume) 
- Flacon élégant (Elegant bottle) 
- Arôme envoûtant (Enchanting aroma) 
- Parfum de caractère (Characterful perfume) 
- Parfum signature (Signature scent) 
- Parfum captivant (Captivating fragrance) 
- Parfum longue durée (Long-lasting perfume)
- Parfum haut de gamme (High-end perfume)
- Parfum de créateur (Designer perfume)
- Parfum incontournable (Must-have perfume)
- Edition limitée (Limited edition)
